firewall.exceptionRationale: Production firewalls are tag-based in reality as of EB PR #418 + terraform apply (Deploy Production Infrastructure, 2026-06-13): droplet_ids removed, tags=["environment:production"] applied in-place, cutover-orthogonal (no droplet touch). The ONLY declared exception is the standing-restricted SSH posture: standing SSH from two fixed source IPs (CI runner 165.232.132.224/32 + staging 143.198.154.94/32) is a genuine permanent blue-green cutover artifact, not a convergence gap. The production_isolated firewall carries runner-only on port 22; the production firewall carries both. complianceStatus remains exception-declared for this SSH posture by design — honest parity, not a deficiency to close. Unheld luhtech-admin-1 dropped from prod TF this PR; removal on live droplets is rebuild-deferred.

transitions.trigger: Initial environment-map authored from env-parity convention substrate (EB-chat 2026-06-13) proven by d-2026-06-13-eb-dev-droplet-rebuild. dev=compliant reference; staging=convergence-target (unheld luhtech-admin-1); production=exception-declared (standing-restricted SSH blue-green + firewall ID->tag convergence pending).

Staging convergence (d-2026-06-13-eb-staging-convergence): EB PR #417 merged (resource-access.json v1.5.0, 2f6efcb7f317290c62520556aea1c6ef20a3af5c) registered both held keys. Removed unheld luhtech-admin-1 from staging sshKeys; resolved luhtech-enterprise (26d39af7) + terraform-deploy-key (6aa99d94) credentialRefs on staging AND dev; staging complianceStatus convergence-target -> compliant. admin-1 left untouched in production (its convergence child handles it).

Production convergence (d-2026-06-13-eb-prod-convergence): EB PR #418 + terraform apply landed both prod firewalls genuinely tag-based (droplet_ids removed, tags=[environment:production], cutover-orthogonal, prod healthy buildSha 6189ce63d0ce761402c14c6a199c14096fd95f63). env-map prod entry: firewall rationale updated to reflect real tag-based state; sourceAddresses filled (runner 165.232.132.224/32 + staging 143.198.154.94/32); terraform-deploy-key credentialRef resolved (6aa99d94); unheld luhtech-admin-1 removed (dropped from prod TF, rebuild-deferred on live droplets). complianceStatus remains exception-declared (standing-restricted SSH = permanent blue-green artifact, honest). Env-parity arc fully converged: zero PENDING across the env-map.

notes: Reference instance for environment-map.schema.json v1.0.0. Env-parity arc fully converged 2026-06-13: all three environments resolved with real values, zero PENDING placeholders in any field. dev = compliant (reference, proven by d-2026-06-13-eb-dev-droplet-rebuild). staging = compliant (d-2026-06-13-eb-staging-convergence, EB PR #417: unheld luhtech-admin-1 removed, held keys registered resource-access.json v1.5.0). production = exception-declared by design (d-2026-06-13-eb-prod-convergence, EB PR #418 + terraform apply): firewalls now genuinely tag-based (droplet_ids removed, tags=[environment:production], cutover-orthogonal); the declared exception is the standing-restricted SSH posture (standing SSH from CI runner 165.232.132.224/32 + staging 143.198.154.94/32), a genuine permanent blue-green cutover artifact, NOT a convergence gap. Unheld luhtech-admin-1 dropped from prod TF; removal on live droplets is rebuild-deferred. Honest parity: the map encodes the real posture of each environment, including production's permanent SSH exception, rather than an aspirational uniform state.
